member.name: T:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.CxComponent.Clients.OmronCxComponentPlcClient
member.summary: Provides an Omron CX-Compolet/CX-Component PLC client.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.CxComponent.Clients.OmronCxComponentPlcClient.#ctor(Dreamine.PLC.Omron.CxComponent.Options.OmronCxComponentOptions)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.CxComponent.Clients.OmronCxComponentPlcClient.#ctor(Dreamine.PLC.Omron.CxComponent.Options.OmronCxComponentOptions,Dreamine.PLC.Omron.CxComponent.Internal.IComObjectFactory)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.CxComponent.Devices.OmronCxAddressNameFormatter
member.summary: Formats Dreamine PLC addresses for CX-Compolet variable/address strings.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.CxComponent.Devices.OmronCxAddressNameFormatter.Format(Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Devices.PlcAddress)
member.summary: Formats a PLC address for CX-Compolet.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.CxComponent.Devices.OmronCxAddressNameFormatter.FormatOffset(Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Devices.PlcAddress,System.Int32)
member.summary: Formats a PLC address after applying an offset delta.

member.name: T:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.CxComponent.Internal.DefaultComObjectFactory
member.summary: Creates installed COM objects through their ProgID.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.CxComponent.Internal.IComObjectFactory.Create(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a COM object from a ProgID.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.CxComponent.Options.OmronCxComponentOptions.ProgId
member.summary: Gets or sets the CX-Compolet COM ProgID.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.CxComponent.Options.OmronCxComponentOptions.PeerAddress
member.summary: Gets or sets the peer address or node name property value.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.CxComponent.Options.OmronCxComponentOptions.PeerAddressPropertyName
member.summary: Gets or sets the property name used for the peer address.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.CxComponent.Options.OmronCxComponentOptions.ActivePropertyName
member.summary: Gets or sets the active/connection property name.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.CxComponent.Options.OmronCxComponentOptions.ReadVariableMethodName
member.summary: Gets or sets the read variable method name.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.CxComponent.Options.OmronCxComponentOptions.WriteVariableMethodName
member.summary: Gets or sets the write variable method name.
